entries.title: Create Your Own Bash Computer Use Agent with NVIDIA Nemotron in One Hour
entries.description: What if you could talk to your computer and have it perform tasks through the Bash terminal, without you writing a single command? With NVIDIA Nemotron Nano v2,...

content.value:
What if you could talk to your computer and have it perform tasks through the Bash terminal, without you writing a single command? With NVIDIA Nemotron Nano v2,...

What if you could talk to your computer and have it perform tasks through the Bash terminal, without you writing a single command? With NVIDIA Nemotron Nano v2, you can easily build a natural language Bash agent from scratch, in under an hour, and with roughly 200 lines of Python code with minimal dependencies. This post will walk you through the core components and considerations step-by…

entries.title: Build an AI Agent to Analyze IT Tickets with NVIDIA Nemotron
entries.description: Modern organizations generate a massive volume of operational data through ticketing systems, incident reports, service requests, support escalations, and more....

content.value:
Modern organizations generate a massive volume of operational data through ticketing systems, incident reports, service requests, support escalations, and more....

Modern organizations generate a massive volume of operational data through ticketing systems, incident reports, service requests, support escalations, and more. These tickets often hold critical signals about systemic issues, recurring pain points, and team performance. But extracting insights from them is a challenge. Most ticketing platforms are built for workflow execution, not analysis.
